reasoning: Following the critique's logic, the market has executed a clear 'break-and-retest' of the Value Area Low (VAL) at 64,109.06. The 15m chart confirms this with multiple rejection wicks at the VAL level on declining volume, indicating that previous support has flipped into a hard resistance ceiling. The 1h trend remains firmly bearish with a sequence of lower highs and lower lows. Given the 'volume gap' visible in the profile below the VAL, price is expected to accelerate downward to hunt liquidity near the 62,200 level. The stop loss is placed above the recent 15m consolidation cluster to invalidate the bearish retest thesis.
reasoning_zh: 遵循评测逻辑，市场已完成对价值区低沿 (VAL) 64,109.06 的典型“跌破并回测”动作。15分钟图确认了这一点：价格在 VAL 附近多次收出上影线且买盘成交量萎缩，表明之前的支撑位已确认为强阻力位。1小时级别趋势维持坚定的下降通道（高低点降低）。鉴于成交量分布图中 VAL 下方存在明显的“成交真空区”，预计价格将加速下跌以寻找 62,200 附近的流动性。止损位设在 15 分钟近期盘整簇上方，若突破则看跌回测逻辑失效。
